overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing exploration of an industrial district with shipping containers, massive pipes, and warehouse buildings. The player walks through narrow passages and open yards, eventually approaching a parked van for interaction.

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow passage between red shipping containers toward open industrial yard

person walking across the open area from left to right

massive curved industrial pipes and green metal framework on building facade
large white industrial pipes running overhead between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corridor between a red shipping container and an industrial building with massive pipes. The camera moves forward, transitioning into a more open industrial yard where pedestrians are visible walking ahead. Overhead pipe networks dominate the skyline against the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with gantry crane and vehicle parking

segments.scene_description: Moving through the wide open industrial yard, the camera passes a yellow gantry crane and turns left, revealing a red warehouse building. A black sports car sits parked under a metal canopy on the right, while pedestrians walk through the asphalt area. The environment is characterized by heavy industrial infrastructure and scattered activity.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the side of a large red industrial building covered in graffiti

entered.detail: massive red corrugated metal wall with white graffiti reading LET THE
industrial waste container with yellow lid and warning labels
scattered cardboard boxes and trash littering the ground near the building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the perimeter of the red warehouse building, passing a green dumpster and scattered cardboard debris. The wall features prominent white graffiti text. The area is devoid of pedestrians, creating a quiet, abandoned atmosphere along the industrial walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between warehouse and container stacks

events.description: slows approach while moving toward parked van at alley end
interaction prompt appears on screen indicating van doors can be opened

agents.ego_description: walking down narrow alley and approaching the rear of a green utility van

notable_agents.action: green panel van parked blocking the narrow alley path ahead

entered.detail: dark green utility van with stickers and graffiti on rear doors, license plate visible
stacked green shipping containers forming the right wall of the alley
electrical cables and wires strung between industrial structures above

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow alley between the red warehouse and green container stacks, approaching a parked green panel van. As the camera gets closer, an interaction prompt appears indicating the van can be opened. Overhead power lines crisscross between the industrial structures in this confined service passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a bustling industrial district that gradually narrows into a secluded service alley. It begins in a tight corridor between a red shipping container and massive pipes before opening into a wide industrial yard filled with pedestrians and dominated by overhead pipe networks. As the camera passes a yellow gantry crane and a black sports car parked under a canopy, the scene shifts toward the perimeter of a red warehouse building marked by white graffiti and scattered debris. The environment then grows quieter and more abandoned as the camera moves past a green dumpster and enters a confined passage between container stacks. Finally, the path leads under a web of crisscrossing power lines toward a parked green panel van, where an interaction prompt appears.
